data.title: End-to-End Encryption
data.description: Ensures secure communications between users and the platform.
data.technical_spec: Encryption protocols such as TLS/SSL for data in transit.

data.title: Two-factor Authentication
data.description: Adds an extra layer of security for user accounts.
data.technical_spec: Support for both SMS-based and authenticator app-based verification.

data.title: Regular Pentesting
data.description: Frequent penetration testing to identify and mitigate vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Red Team assessments and bounty programs to incentivize vulnerability reporting.

data.title: AI-based Threat Detection
data.description: Machine learning algorithms to detect and respond to threats in real-time.
data.technical_spec: Anomaly detection systems analyzing logs and user activity patterns.

data.title: Data Anonymization
data.description: Techniques implemented to anonymize sensitive user data.
data.technical_spec: Data masking, pseudonymization methods to protect user privacy.
